---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem or motivation**
What problem does this solve, or what would it make possible?

**Proposed solution**
How you think it should work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the one above.

**Scope**
Which part of the project does this touch?
- [ ] Agent loop (CLAUDE.md / cycle logic)
- [ ] Memory system (Supabase learnings / mem0 / Qdrant)
- [ ] Dashboard (Next.js app in `dashboard/`)
- [ ] Runner (Python runner in `runner/`)
- [ ] Static site (GitHub Pages in `docs/`)
- [ ] Other: 

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links, or examples that help illustrate the idea.
